notes: Normal-male phantom — no aneurysm (aneurysm_max_diameter_mm is null on purpose). Aorta is straight (angulation 0°). Aortic dimensions taper from R=12.5 (Ø 25 mm) above the renals to R=9 (Ø 18 mm) at the bifurcation. CIA radius 6 mm (Ø 12 mm). Bifurc at Z=135 mm, renals at Z=50 mm → 85 mm renal-to-bifurc distance.
